n: Instance: High Seat of the Dwarves

steps.t: Durin stands with his personal guard Hrostyr not far from the Steepset, and he waits to speak with you.
Now that you have cleared the stairs of his foes, Durin can climb to the Steepset. He waits to speak with you at the top of the stairs.
Durin stands by the Steepset, mourning for what has been lost.
